nasb.text: Even the beasts of the field pant for You; For the water brooks are dried up And fire has devoured the pastures of the wilderness.

esv.text: Even the beasts of the field pant for you because the water brooks are dried up, and fire has devoured the pastures of the wilderness.

cnv.text: 田野的走獸也向你發喘， 因為溪水都乾涸了， 火吞滅了曠野的草場。

ccb.text: 田野的走兽向你呼求， 因为溪水已经枯干， 火也烧尽了旷野的草场。
